ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the department */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of faculty members in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that offers the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., BCA 202) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Mathematics – IV) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "marks_internal" INTEGER /* Internal marks (out of 25) */,
  "marks_external" INTEGER /* External marks (out of 75) */,
  "pre_requisites" TEXT /* Course codes of any prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "lecture_schedule" TEXT /* Detailed schedule of lectures */,
  "tutorial_schedule" TEXT /* Detailed schedule of tutorials */,
  "lab_schedule" TEXT /* Detailed schedule of lab sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Location of the classroom */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor for the schedule */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES course_schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment (e.g., Midterm, Final) */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the assessment (out of 100) */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question paper */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "paper_name" TEXT /* Name of the question paper */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the question paper */,
  "total_questions" INTEGER /* Total number of questions in the paper */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the exam center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the exam center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the exam center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam schedule */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam center */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "proctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the proctor responsible for the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_schedules_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_schedules_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES exam_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_schedules_proctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("proctor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was submitted */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluator who marked the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id", "student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average for the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours earned for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_grade FOREIGN KEY ("grade") REFERENCES grade_definitions ("grade_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_definitions" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "min_marks" INTEGER /* Minimum marks required to achieve the grade */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks required to achieve the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report" TEXT /* Report details */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of students in the course */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who passed the course */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor about the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the instructor works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
